name: high_anchor
content:
# Comprehensive Enterprise Platform

## Compliance
Fully compliant with SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS v4.0, GDPR, CCPA.

## Security
- Zero-trust architecture with mTLS between all services
- HSM-backed key management
- Automated vulnerability scanning (SAST/DAST/SCA)
- Incident response plan with 15-minute RTO

## Documentation
- OpenAPI 3.1 spec with examples for every endpoint
- Architecture decision records (ADRs) for all significant choices
- Runbooks for every operational procedure
- Automated documentation generation from code annotations
